task_completion.description: Locate the 'Boston Heart Institute' site in OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenClinica web interface with the 'Boston Heart Institute' (CV-BHI-001) site visible in the site management or administration section.

task_completion.description: Change the status of the 'Boston Heart Institute' site to Locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface showing the status of CV-BHI-001 as 'Locked', or a confirmation message indicating the site status was successfully changed to Locked.

task_completion.description: Generate the Subject Casebook for subject CV-BHI-101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface showing the casebook generation process, download prompt, or print-to-PDF dialog specifically for subject CV-BHI-101.

task_completion.description: Generate the Subject Casebook for subject CV-BHI-102.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface showing the casebook generation process, download prompt, or print-to-PDF dialog specifically for subject CV-BHI-102.

task_completion.description: Export the dataset for the Boston Heart Institute site in CDISC ODM XML format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica dataset export page showing the selection of the CDISC ODM XML format for the Boston Heart Institute site, followed by a download action.

task_completion.description: Save the generated PDFs and XML to the correct directory with the specified filenames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing the /home/ga/Documents/ directory containing exactly these files: 'CV-BHI-101_Casebook.pdf', 'CV-BHI-102_Casebook.pdf', and 'BHI_Site_Data.xml'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active navigation and interaction within the OpenClinica web interface (e.g., clicking buttons, navigating menus) rather than just creating dummy files via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The saved files appear to be genuine exports from OpenClinica.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the files are shown in a file manager, their file sizes should be non-zero. If opened, the PDFs and XML should display actual clinical data formatting and content, not empty or manually typed placeholder text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running 'psql' commands or scripts to manually update the site status or extract data directly from the PostgreSQL database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Site Identifier: CV-BHI-001. Subject 1: CV-BHI-101. Subject 2: CV-BHI-102. Expected PDF 1 path: /home/ga/Documents/CV-BHI-101_Casebook.pdf. Expected PDF 2 path: /home/ga/Documents/CV-BHI-102_Casebook.pdf. Expected XML path: /home/ga/Documents/BHI_Site_Data.xml.
